nodes.label: Telecom Company
nodes.notes: A telecommunications business that operates a large fleet of connected field devices and subscribes to the protection service.

nodes.label: Telecom Operator
nodes.notes: A staff member who imports devices, views readings, toggles protection, and reviews traceability.

nodes.label: Security Management Console
nodes.notes: Flutter app for onboarding, fleet overview, imports, protection toggles, traceability, and alerts.

nodes.label: Device Protection Service
nodes.notes: Always-on trusted agent that manages devices, stores registry and traces, and forwards commands.

nodes.label: IoT Device
nodes.notes: Connected field device with its own identity or managed key record.

nodes.label: Device Registry
nodes.notes: Encrypted inventory, protection state, and import source.

nodes.label: Telemetry & Trace Log
nodes.notes: Encrypted telemetry stream and traceability history.

nodes.label: Threat Monitor
nodes.notes: Always-on watcher that detects anomalies, raises alerts, explains likely causes, and requests isolation.
